title: Ice Lolly Moulds 9 Popsicle Moulds with Base and Stickers, Reusable Ice Cream Moulds,Lolly Moulds with Sticks Ideal for Juice Puree Fruit
features: 【9-Piece Popsicle Molds】Our popsicle ice pop maker come with 50 popsicle sticks. You can freeze 9 large square-shaped classic popsicles at once.
【Safe Material】: Our popsicles molds are made of high-quality, heat-resistant and low-temperature resistant PP material, and adopt environmentally friendly materials.

【Easy Release】After taking out the popsicle maker molds from the freezer, simply leave them in the air for 2-3 minutes and then gently pull them out. The 9-slot base makes it convenient to fix the molds on the base, saving refrigerator space.

【No More Sticky Hands】The ice pop molds have a drip tray at the base of each one to catch drips, so no more sticky hands! The slotted holes in the stick secure the stick in the popsicles, making it easy to remove them from the mold.

【DIY Making】Make delicious DIY popsicles for your family, kids, and friends on a hot summer day! You can use the popsicle molds to make fruit, juice, honey, chocolate, milk, soda, and other materials.
